verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have come to the end of a year, with You and I thank you Lord I thank you I have safely made it through because of you We have come to the end of a year, with you And we thank you Lord we thank you We have safely made it through because of you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are the miracle (x2), in our lives And we thank you, Lord we thank you We have safely made it through because of you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So many have gone on the other side, to be with You And we thank you Lord we thank you They have safely made it through because of you. So many this year has been baptised and identified with you And we thank you, Lord we thank you, they have safely made it through because of you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So many received healing in their lives, All because of you And we thank you Lord we thank you They have safely made it through because of you Your servant has travelled around the world and reaching lives Sharing what he has received from you And we thank you Lord we thank you They have safely made it through because of you.
